name: Teams
desc: Create/update/remove a scoreboard team. Manages team name, prefix/suffix, players, friendly fire, and nametag visibility.

implementation.overview: S3E manages scoreboard teams — creating, updating, removing, and managing membership. NameTags modules may use team prefix/suffix to add client-side nametag formatting. No module in the examined primary client sources (Rise 6.0, Sigma 4.11, Jigsaw 0.26, RektSky B5, Memeware 7.3, Aqua 13) specifically targets S3E beyond the vanilla handler.

modules.name: Vanilla Handler (S3EPacketTeams)
modules.purpose: Server sends S3EPacketTeams to update the client. Processed by NetHandlerPlayClient. No module in the 500+ examined client sources specifically intercepts this packet.
